title: New top local AI image generator is here! Already uncensored
summary: Krea 2 is a local, open-source AI image generator that can run uncensored on personal hardware. The tutorial covers installation in ComfyUI, model downloads from Hugging Face, LoRA training, and integration with ComfyUI nodes for image generation workflows.
writeup: This tutorial from AI Search walks through Krea 2, a local, open-source image generator that runs uncensored on personal hardware. The walkthrough covers installation in ComfyUI, model downloads from Hugging Face, LoRA training, and wiring the model into ComfyUI nodes for image generation workflows. The practical value lies in keeping inference local and avoiding hosted-service restrictions, with LoRA fine-tuning available for customizing outputs.
